title: Star Wars Insider 88
content:
{{Top|rwm|ref|title=''Star Wars Insider'' 88}} {{MagazineIssue |image=[[File:Insider_88a.jpg]] |title=''Star Wars Insider'' 88 |editor=[[Frank Parisi]] |cover artist= |contributors=*[[Drew Karpyshyn]] *[[Hugh Sterbakov]] *[[Jason Fry]] *[[Jude Watson]] *[[Joe Nazzaro]] *[[Dustin Roberts]] *[[Chris Trevas]] *[[Pablo Hidalgo]] *[[Bonnie Burton]] *[[Stephen J. Sansweet]] *[[Mary Franklin]] *[[Scott Kimball]] *[[Matthew Simmons]] *[[Linh Ngo]] *[[Julia Wana]] |publisher=[[IDG Entertainment]] |release date=[[June 13]], [[2006]]{{SWArchive|url=community/fanclub/mag/news20060518.html|text=The Sith Rule ''Star Wars Insider'' #88}} |subscribers=Early June [[2006]] |pages= |isbn= |issn= |genre= |issue= |series= }} '''''Star Wars Insider'' 88''' is the 88th issue of ''[[Star Wars Insider]]'', released in mid-[[June]] [[2006]]. This issue centers around the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] and the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side of the Force]]. It came in four different "Special Sith Issue" covers by [[Aaron McBride]] and [[Christian Alzmann]], each featuring a different [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]]. Almost all of the pages were black as opposed to the normal white. ==Contents== ===Departments=== *"Letter from the Editor" {{C|by Frank Parisi}} *"[[Comlink (department)|Comlink]]" *"[[Skywalking]]" **"Han Shoots First!" — Original theatrical versions of the ''Star Wars'' trilogy now available on [[Star Wars home video releases|DVD]] **"Obey Vader" — Known for his poster design for the popular [[Wikipedia:Johnny Cash|Johnny Cash]] biopic, [[Wikipedia:Walk the Line|''Walk the Line'']], artist [[Shepard Fairey]] sets his sights on another man in black. {{C|by Frank Parisi and [[Eugene Wang]]}} **"Faces of Evil" — For [[Dave Elsey]], [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|''Revenge of the Sith'']] was an opportunity to show viewers the true nature of the dark side. {{C|by [[Joe Nazzaro]]}} **"How Can I Get Your Job?" *"[[Set Piece|Technical Readout]]" — Death Star II Main Hangar {{C|by [[Chris Trevas]]}} *"[[Star Wars Q&A|Ask the Master]]" — A Lesson in Absolutes {{C|by [[Pablo Hidalgo]]}} *"[[Scouting the Galaxy]]" — Why Is the Dark Side So Darn Attractive? {{C|by [[Stephen J. Sansweet]]}} *"[[Jabba's Collection]]" — At Last They Will Have Their Revenge *"[[Best of Hyperspace]]" — Best of ''Star Wars'' Blogs {{C|by [[Bonnie Burton]] and Pablo Hidalgo}} *"[[Padawan's Corner]]" — Make Your Own Vader Mural {{C|by Bonnie Burton}} *[[Bantha Tracks (department)|''Bantha Tracks'']] Vol. 19 *"Laugh It Up, Fuzzball" ===Features=== *"[[Morbid Visions]]" {{C|by [[Frank Parisi]]}} *:[[Industrial Light & Magic|ILM]] artists Aaron McBride and Christian Alzmann talk about creating this issue's four Sith Lord covers, and take a look at some early designs and unused concepts. *"[[Heritage of the Sith]]" {{C|by [[Drew Karpyshyn]]}} *:An ancient book holds all of the historical knowledge and "wisdom" of the Sith. Is it simply the ranting of a dark side sympathizer—or something much more sinister? *"[[Lessons in Light and Darkness]]" {{C|by Frank Parisi}} *:Actor [[Ray Park]] talks to ''Insider'' about better living through martial arts, ''[[Star Wars]]'', and his upcoming films. Plus, Park teaches you to fight like a Sith! *"[[Betrayal is Just The Beginning]]" {{C|by [[Jason Fry]]}} *:''Insider'' explores the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]-shattering new series of books featuring [[Clan Fett|Fetts]], [[Solo family/Legends|Solos]], [[Skywalker family/Legends|Skywalkers]], and the return of Vader's apprentice: [[Lumiya]]. *:[[Aaron Allston]] kicks off the startling new series—''[[Star Wars: Legacy of the Force]]''—with a slew of surprises. *"[[Legacies of Future Orders]]" {{C|by Frank Parisi}} *:In the second of a three-part series, ''Insider'' introduces you to some of the best and the baddest from the upcoming [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] series [[Star Wars: Legacy|''Star Wars'' Legacy]]. *"[[Ghosts of the Sith]]" {{C|by [[Jude Watson]]}} *:A short story by the author of the [[Scholastic]] series ''[[Star Wars: The Last of the Jedi]]''. This interlude takes place between book #2—[[The Last of the Jedi: Dark Warning|''Dark Warning'']]—and #3, [[The Last of the Jedi: Underworld|''Underworld'']]. *:A short excursion to [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]] turns into a struggle with the dark side for ex-Jedi [[Ferus Olin]]. *"[[Virtual Sith]]" {{C|by [[Hugh Sterbakov]]}} *:Unleash the power of the dark side with ''Insider's'' guide to the Sith Lords you want to play, and play against. ==Media== {{Mediacat|from=1|imagecat=Images from Star Wars Insider 88}} ===Cover gallery=== This is a gallery of the different cover variations of ''Star Wars Insider'' #88. by Aaron McBride File:Insider_88b.jpg|Cover 2 File:Insider88b_art.jpg|Cover 2 art

by Christian Alzmann ==Sources== *{{SWArchive|url=community/fanclub/mag/news20060518.html|text=The Sith Rule ''Star Wars Insider'' #88}} *{{Hyperspace|url=hyperspace/member/insideronline/88/index.html|text=''Star Wars Insider'' #88 Online Supplement}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *{{Blog|fparisi|2|Star Wars Insider Issue 88: The Sith Issue}} {{InsiderNav|87|89}} {{Interlang |fr=Star Wars Insider 88 |ka=Star Wars Insider 88 |tr=Star Wars Insider 88 }} [[Category:Star Wars Insider issues|088]]
